name: James Clapper
summary: Former Director of National Intelligence who questioned Trump's fitness for office and said Putin was handling Trump like an asset after the Helsinki summit.

keyStatements.quote: I think this past weekend is illustrative of what a great case officer Vladimir Putin is. He knows how to handle an asset, and that's what he's doing with the president.
I really question his ability to be — his fitness to be — in this office, and I also am beginning to wonder about his motivation for it.
keyStatements.context: Interview on Trump and Russia probe

keyStatements.quote: I question his fitness to be in this office.

timeline.event: Left DNI when Trump took office

credibility.background: Former Director of National Intelligence, Lieutenant General in Air Force, 50+ years in intelligence
positions: Under Secretary of Defense for Intelligence (2007-2010)

oppositionReasons: Said Putin was handling Trump like an asset

sources.title: Clapper: Putin knows how to handle an asset
Clapper questions Trump's fitness for office
